summary_one_line: PNG IHDR color_type byte at file offset 0x19 must have bit 0x02 (PNG_COLOR_MASK_COLOR) cleared, i.e. a grayscale color_type

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The PNG IHDR color_type byte (file offset 0x19) must not carry bit 0x02 (PNG_COLOR_MASK_COLOR). Concretely color_type in {0, 3, 4}; the winner-resolving seeds use 0x00 (grayscale), while loser-blocking seeds use 0x06 (RGB+alpha). Correlated IHDR fields at 0x13 (width LSB), 0x18 (bit_depth), and 0x1c (interlace) must also remain self-consistent so the chunk reaches the gate.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds put 0x00 at offset 0x19 (grayscale color_type). The expression (color_type & 0x02) then evaluates to 0, so the gate at L1216 takes the false (winning) branch reaching the else arm at L1224-L1230.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds put 0x06 at offset 0x19 (RGB+alpha color_type). (0x06 & 0x02) = 0x02 != 0, so the gate at L1216 takes the true (blocked) branch into L1217-L1222. All 10 loser-blocking seeds have 0x06 at this offset; only color_type values lacking the 0x02 bit clear the gate.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback rewards inputs that come closer to satisfying integer comparisons. The bitwise-AND-with-literal gate at L1216 emits a trace_cmp with one operand being (color_type & 0x02) and the other being 0; CMP_MAP-bucket feedback distinguishes color_type=0x06 (bit set) from color_type=0x00 (bit clear), so inputs flipping the 0x02 bit toward zero are preserved as corpus. naive and cmplog lack this gradient: naive has only edge feedback, and cmplog's input-to-state substitution mutator cannot meaningfully substitute a 1-bit bitmask literal as if it were a multi-byte magic constant. cmplog therefore performs no better than naive here (both are losers; pair shape BBRR), while value_profile_cmplog inherits the CMP_MAP gradient and resolves at the same rate as value_profile.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs at this branch carry the value_profile technique delta, not I2S.
The second decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog > cmplog with the same value_profile delta.
The blocker source line is a bitwise-AND test of png_ptr->color_type against PNG_COLOR_MASK_COLOR.
The globally blocked side is the false branch, so the winning side is the false arm (else branch at L1224).
Winner-resolving seeds carry 0x00 at file offset 0x19 while loser-blocking seeds carry 0x06.
Per-role coverage confirms the winner set took the L1224 else arm and the loser set took the L1217 true arm.
The W-only else arm at L1224 sets sig_bit.gray, consistent with grayscale color_type taking the false branch.
DIVERGENT BRANCHES at the blocker line confirm W took F (10 times across the seed pool) while L took T.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1216  T=0 F=2  T=10 F=0  if ((png_ptr->color_type & PNG_COLOR_MASK_COLOR) != 0)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile installs CMP_MAP gradient buckets on integer CMPs so inputs whose operands move closer to matching are preserved.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
each CMP callback writes into a `CMP_MAP` keyed by (PC, operand-distance
bucket)

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile preserves an input that brings a CMP-operand pair closer to matching than previously seen.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog's mutator addition is I2SRandReplace, which substitutes captured CMP operands at matching byte sequences in the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
**Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient, not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory lineage check does not apply. The attribution rests on (a) BOTH decisive pairs carrying the value_profile delta (Pair 1 vp>naive, Pair 2 vpc>cmplog), (b) the shape being BBRR with cmplog non-decisive against naive — directly indicating I2S does not help at this branch — and (c) the gate being a 1-bit bitmask test (color_type & 0x02) which I2SRandReplace cannot meaningfully substitute (the literal operand is a single bit, not a multi-byte magic), whereas CMP_MAP records the per-PC operand-distance bucket so flipping bit 0x02 toward zero registers as a closer-to-match bucket and the corpus preserves the seed.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with a single `if ((input[OFF] & 0x02) != 0) <blocker>` gate (no other constraints), swept across fuzzers, in which cmplog matches value_profile's resolution probability — that would refute the claim that the 1-bit bitmask gate is specifically a CMP_MAP-gradient feature and not just a generic easy-to-flip byte.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the >=8/10 vp resolution truly comes from CMP_MAP gradient on the bitmask CMP at L1216 itself versus from CMP_MAP gradient on upstream PNG-chunk size/CRC gates (e.g. L1194 length check, png_crc_finish at L1204) that vp clears more reliably, with the L1216 outcome being a downstream byproduct of which chunks vp manages to reach.
